name: Sino Gold Mining Limited
description: Sino Gold Mining Limited was a prominent gold mining company headquartered in Sydney, Australia, that focused on the exploration, development, and operation of gold mining projects in China. The company was a significant player in the Chinese gold sector, operating major assets such as the Jinfeng and White Mountain gold mines. Sino Gold Mining Limited was publicly traded on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker SGX until it was acquired by Eldorado Gold Corporation in December 2009, marking a major consolidation in the international gold mining industry.
